company: Summit Ridge Insurance Group, Columbus, OH
title: Software Development Intern
roleDescription:
Built and maintained Duck Creek XML and React.js with TypeScript across 100+ shared repository files.
Delivered 125+ Agile sprint tasks using SourceTree and Jira for version control and workflow management.

Partnered with cross-functional teams (QA, BA, UX, Data) to deliver system-wide features and improvements.
Conducted code reviews and regression testing in layered repositories to ensure code quality and system stability.
